name: New Claim - Happy Path (SMS link)
description: Path 1 new claimant files a claim and receives the form link by SMS.
initialMessage: Hi, I need to file a warranty claim for my hybrid battery.
expectedOutcome: Agent acknowledges, confirms this is a NEW claim (not previously submitted), offers to text the link, confirms the phone number, sends SMS pointing to greenbeanbattery.com > Warranty (top right) > Submit a Claim, then sets expectations: confirmation email, second email with claim number, allow at least 24 business hours, monitor spam.
expectedMilestones: warranty intent recognized, new-claim path confirmed, SMS offered and number confirmed, correct website navigation given, 24-business-hour expectation set
